zh.lifeSummary: 當Lady Isabella Langley於1385年出生在英國藍卡爾曼徹斯特時，她的父親Robert Langley15歲，母親Catherine Atherton5歲。她於1402年與Sir Nicholas De Hyde結婚。他們至少是3個兒子的父母。她去世於1489年享年104歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Lady Isabella Langley于1385年出生在英国藍卡爾曼徹斯特时，她的父亲Robert Langley15岁，母亲Catherine Atherton5岁。她于1402年与Sir Nicholas De Hyde结婚。他们至少是3个儿子的父母。她去世于1489年享年104岁。

nameMeanings.name: Langley
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English: habitational name from any of numerous places called Langley or Longley (in Kent, Sussex, Hertfordshire, Norfolk, Somerset, Shrops, Lancashire, Durham, and many other counties), themselves from Old English lang ‘long’ + lēah ‘wood, glade, clearing’.
English: from the Middle English female personal name Langlif (Old Norse Langlíf ‘long’ + ‘life’ or ‘body’).

variants.name: Langlais
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  French Lucien, Pierre, Emile, Marcel, Normand, Albertine, Armand, Cecile, Enoil, Herve, Jacques, Laurent.
French: ethnic name for an Englishman, from Anglais ‘Englishman’, with fused definite article l'. Compare Langley .

History: Daniel Sargent dit Sérien and Langlais from Worcester, MA married Marguerite Lavoie in Rivière-Ouelle, QC, in 1718. Joseph Weber dit Langlais from Boston, MA married Marie-Charlotte Guillet in Cap Saint-Ignace, QC, in 1725.

variants.name: Longley
meanings: English (mainly Nottinghamshire and South Yorkshire): variant of   Langley  . Compare   Longpre   2.

nameMeanings.name: Lady
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English: from Middle English lavedi, levedi, ladi ‘lady, female head of a household, woman, wife’ (Old English hlǣfdige). As a man's name it may have been used in mockery, or be short for occupational names such as Ladyman.
Hungarian (Ládi): habitational name for someone from Lád in Borsod County or Lad in Somogy County.

variants.name: Lada
meanings: ‘tendril’ or ‘creeper’, often used in metaphors describing the slender curvature of eyebrows, arms, hair, swords, lightning, and women's bodies.

nameMeanings.name: Isabella
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: form of   Isabel  , which has been popular in England since the 18th century and has recently become the preferred form of the name.

variants.name: Isobella
meanings: form of   Isabel  , which has been popular in England since the 18th century and has recently become the preferred form of the name.

historicEvents.title: Wars of the Roses
historicEvents.description: Wars of the Roses was a series of English civil wars for control of the throne of England between the royal families House of Lancaster and the House of York. The name of the war was derived as the red rose was the symbol of the Lancastrians and the white rose was the symbol of the Yorks.

en.lifeSummary: When Lady Isabella Langley was born in 1385, in Manchester, Lancashire, England, her father, Robert Langley, was 15 and her mother, Catherine Atherton, was 5. She married Sir Nicholas De Hyde in 1402. They were the parents of at least 3 sons. She died in 1489, at the age of 104.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Lady Isabella Langley est née en 1385, à Manchester, Lancashire, Angleterre, son père, Robert Langley, avait 15 ans et sa mère, Catherine Atherton, avait 5 ans. Elle a épousé Sir Nicholas De Hyde en 1402. Ils ont eu au moins 3 fils. Elle est décédée en 1489, à l’âge de 104 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Lady Isabella Langley 1385 in Manchester, Lancashire, England geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Robert Langley 15 und ihre Mutter Catherine Atherton 5. Sie hat 1402 Sir Nicholas De Hyde geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 3 Söhne. Sie starb 1489 im Alter von 104 Jahren.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Lady Isabella Langley è nata il nel 1385 nel Manchester, Lancashire, England, sua padre, Robert Langley, aveva 15 anni e sua madre, Catherine Atherton, aveva 5 anni. Lei sposato Sir Nicholas De Hyde nel 1402. Erano genitori di almeno 3 figli. Morì nel 1489, all'età di 104 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Lady Isabella Langleyが1385年にイギリスランカシュアイアマンチェスターで生まれた時，父Robert Langleyは15歳，母Catherine Athertonは5歳であった。1402年にSir Nicholas De Hydeと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも3人の息子の親であった。彼女は1489年に104歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Lady Isabella Langley(이)가 1385년 영국 랭카실르 먼체스터에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Robert Langley(은)는 15세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Catherine Atherton(은)는 5세였다. 그녀는 1402년 Sir Nicholas De Hyde(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 세 명의 아들을 두었다. 그녀는 1489년 104세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Lady Isabella Langley nasceu em 1385, em Manchester, Lancashire, Inglaterra, seu pai, Robert Langley, tinha 15 anos e sua mãe, Catherine Atherton, tinha 5 anos. Ela casou-se com Sir Nicholas De Hyde em 1402. Eles tiveram pelo menos 3 filhos. Ela faleceu em 1489, com 104 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Lady Isabella Langley родилась в 1385 г. в местности манчестир, ланкашир, Англия, её отцу по имени Robert Langley было 15 лет, а матери, которую звали Catherine Atherton, 5. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Sir Nicholas De Hyde в 1402 г. У них было по крайней мере 3 сына. Она умерла в 1489 г. в возрасте 104 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Lady Isabella Langley nació en 1385, en Manchester, Lancashire, Inglaterra, su papá, Robert Langley, tenía 15 años y su mamá, Catherine Atherton, tenía 5 años. Se casó con Sir Nicholas De Hyde en 1402. Fueron padres de por lo menos 3 hijos. Murió en 1489, a la edad de 104 años.
